detection_signals: Sauternes is always the sweetest wine
More residual sugar always means sweeter on the palate
Sauternes has more residual sugar than any Icewine
why_incorrect: While Sauternes is sweet, it is not always the sweetest dessert wine. Icewines, some Tokajis, and certain other styles can exceed Sauternes in residual sugar.
misconception: Sauternes is the sweetest style of dessert wine because of the highest residual sugar content.
corrected_understanding: Sauternes is a sweet wine with botrytis influence, but it is not necessarily the highest in residual sugar among dessert wines.
